title: polyscias subincisa
intro: Polyscias subincisa, also known as the African green ginger or cut leaf polyscias, is a plant species in the Araliaceae family that is native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to have potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Polyscias subincisa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of Polyscias subincisa typically involve boiling the roots or leaves in water to create a tea or infusion, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
